creator: hcoyote@ghostar.org
text:
On Sun, Mar 04, 2007 at 11:30:18PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-MasonX-WebApp,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/109869 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109869
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Approved.

I haven't worked with this in awhile.  If Martin is up for taking it over,
I'm happy to give it to him.

Travis
